Paracetamol Advance Hama Pharma tablets contain a disintegrant system which accelerates tablet dissolution compared to
standard paracetamol tablets. Moreover, the time taken to reach plasma paracetamol therapeutic threshold (4-7mcg/ml) is
at least 37% faster with Paracetamol Advance tablets compared to standard paracetamol tablets. But the total extent of
absorption of paracetamol from Paracetmol Advance tablets is equivalent to that from standard paracetamol tablets.
